params.name: name
params.description: The name of the input, which is submitted with the form data.

params.name: value
params.description: Optional initial value of the input.

params.name: describedBy
params.description: One or more element IDs to add to the input `aria-describedby` attribute.

params.name: label
params.description: Plain-text label used for the input and default no-results message.

params.name: errorMessage
params.description: Options for the error message component. The error message component will not display if you use a falsy value for `errorMessage`, for example `false` or `null`.

params.name: classes
params.description: Classes to add to the form-group wrapper.

params.name: options
params.description: Selectable string options for the auto-complete component.

params.name: noResultsText
params.description: Optional custom message shown when the query has no matching suggestions.

params.name: classes
params.description: Classes to add to the enhanced autocomplete field. Width classes also constrain the suggestions dropdown.

params.name: attributes
params.description: HTML attributes (for example placeholder, autocomplete or data attributes) to add to the enhanced autocomplete input.
